assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 35 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration' as a level-2 heading.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 37: '### Product Lifecycle' heading. Line 39: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 40: 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 41: 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 42: 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 43: 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 required fields are present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 46: '### Version Streams' heading. Lines 47-49 contain a markdown table with headers 'Stream | Konflux Release Repo | Local Path | Security Matrix Path' and one data row: '2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 51: '### Source Repositories' heading. Lines 52-56 contain a markdown table with headers 'Repository | URL' and two rows: 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend' and 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, and Code Intelligence with Limitations
assertion_results.evidence: Line 1: '# Project Configuration'. Line 3: '## Repository Registry' with a table containing backend and frontend-ui entries. Line 12: '## Jira Configuration' with Project key TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID 10142, and custom fields. Line 18: '## Code Intelligence' with tool naming convention documentation. Line 31: '### Limitations' subsection under Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 8 (lines 48-63): 'Security Configuration was opted in.' (line 50). 'Collected Product Lifecycle fields:' (line 51) followed by all 5 fields. 'Collected Version Streams:' (line 57) with 2.1.x details. 'Collected Source Repositories:' (line 59) with backend and frontend-ui entries.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lists all sections as newly added: '### 1. Project Configuration (top-level heading)' (line 5), '### 2. Repository Registry' (line 9), '### 3. Jira Configuration' (line 16), '### 4. Code Intelligence' (line 24), '### 5. Security Configuration' (line 33) with 'Added ## Security Configuration section with:' and details of all subsections.
